description: A search warrant authorizes the collection of existing (allocated) photographs, but explicitly forbids the recovery of deleted files or the carving of unallocated space. Over-collection could invalidate the case. Create a forensic case named 'Warrant_Compliance_2024' with case number 'INV-WAR-011' and ingest the disk image /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd. Identify and extract all currently allocated JPEG files (.jpg or .jpeg) to /home/ga/Reports/Allocated_Media/. Ensure no deleted files, orphan files, or carved files are included in the extraction. Create a chain-of-custody manifest at /home/ga/Reports/media_manifest.csv with the headers FILENAME,MD5_HASH,FILE_SIZE_BYTES and populate it with the details of the extracted allocated files.
